ab: Ima ka hiya?
en: A: Who is he?

ab: Swayi snaw tama mu ka hiya.
en: He is my uncle.

ab: Wa qmpah manu ka mnswayi snaw bubu su?
ch: A:你的舅舅從事什麼工作?
en: A: What does your uncle do for a living?

ab: Keysacu ka hiya.
en: B: He's a cop.

ab: Ima ka sediq way?
en: A: Who is that guy?

ab: Qbsuran mu qridin ka hiya.
en: B: She's my sister.

ab: Niqan qpahun ka qbsuran su qridin hu?
en: A: Does your sister have a job?

ab: Wa qmpah byoing ka hiya.
en: B: She works in a hospital.

ab: Tnswayi ka ddha sediq way hu?
ch: A:他們兩個人是兄弟姐妹嗎?
en: A: Are they brothers and sisters?

ab: Uxay, msdupung ka dhiya.
en: B: No, they are friends.

ab: Sediq Tnpusu su ka isu hu?
en: A: Are you Aboriginal?

ab: Iyaq, Sediq ku balay ka yaku.
en: B: Yes, I'm a Seducer.

ab: Sediq tnpusu ka qridin su hu?
en: A: Is your wife Aboriginal?

ab: Iyaq, binaw Sediq Balay ka hiya.
ch: B:是，但是她是賽德克族的。
en: B:Yes, but she's a Sedic.

ab: Reykun bay ka tama su hu?
en: A: Is your father very tall?

ab: Iyaq, reykun bay kana ka tnsapah nami.
en: B: Yes, we are all very tall.

ab: Wada muyas ka swayi su qridin da hu?
en: A: Does your sister go to school?

ab: Iyaq, wada muyas ka hiya da.
en: B: Yes, she went to school.

ab: Mkla rmngaw kari Sediq ka dswayi su hu?
en: A: Do your siblings speak the language?

ab: Iyaq, mkla rmngaw kari Sediq ka dhiya?
en: B: Yes, they speak the ethnic language.

ab: Piya knhbrawan ka tnswayi namu?
en: A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?

ab: Tturu nami hiyi ka tnswayi nami.
en: B: I have three brothers and sisters.

ab: Msupu su tama bubu mniq sapah ka isu hu?
ch: A:你和爸爸媽媽一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your parents?

ab: Iyaq, msupu ku tama bubu mu mniq sapah ka yaku.
ch: B:是，我和爸爸媽媽一起住。
en: B: Yes, I live with my mom and dad.

ab: Msupu su tama rudan bubu rudan mniq sapah ka isu hu?
ch: A:你和爺爺奶奶一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your grandparents?

ab: Ini, ini ku psupu dhiya mniq sapah ka yaku.
ch: B:不，我沒和跟他們一起住。
en: B: No, I didn't live with them.

ab: Msupu su ima msupu mniq sapah?
en: A: Who do you live with?

ab: Msupu ku tama mi bubu mi qbsuran snaw ka mniq sapah.
ch: B:我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥住在一起。
en: B: I live with my father, mother and brother.

ab: Kndadax su inu miyah ka isu?
en: A: Where are you from?

ab: Kndadax ku alang Toda miyah ka yaku.
en: B: I am from the tribe of Duda.

ab: Wa inu ka sapah su?
en: A: Where is your home?

ab: Wa mniq alang Ungu ka sapah mu.
en: B: Our home is in the Ungu Yanu tribe.

ab: Wa mniq inu ka alang nniqan rudan su?
en: A:Where is your hometown?

ab: Wa mniq alang Snuwil ka alang nniqan rudan mu.
ch: B:我的故鄉在史努櫻部落
en: B: My hometown is in the Snozakura tribe.

ab: Wa mniq inu ka alang namu?
en: A: Where is your tribe?

ab: Wa msdalih Bnuhur Rmdax Tasil ka alang nami.
ch: B:我們的部落都在白石聖山區域一帶
en: B: Our tribes are all in the White Rock Holy Mountain area.

ab: So knuwan ka musa su alang?
ch: A:你什麼時候會回去部落?
en: A: When are you going back to the tribe?

ab: Sngayan rbawan cida pa qulung ku musa alang.
en: B: I will go back in the summer.

ab: Laqi ku Sediq Balay ka yaku.
en: B: I'm a Sydnek child.
